summary: Iteration 9: Frontend-only testing of new UDS Members Table component. All 12 requested features verified working correctly. The component displays in Sizing tab after Token Calculator Summary and allows full CRUD operations on grid members.
passed_tests: UDS Members Table displays in Sizing tab after Token Calculator Summary
Grid Members header shows member count (2 Members), token total (1,350 Tokens), DNS/DHCP badges (2 DNS | 2 DHCP)
Add Grid Member button creates new member with defaults (Member-1, NIOS Physical, TE-926, DNS + DHCP, 880 tokens)
Member table columns: Name, Location, Platform, Model/Size, Role, HA, Tokens - all present and functional
Location dropdown lists Data Centers (Main DC, DR DC) and Sites (Branch 1, Branch 2) from Quick Capture
Platform dropdown shows: NIOS Physical, NIOS Virtual, NIOS HA Pair, NIOS-X Virtual Server (NXVS), NIOS-X as a Service (NXaaS)
Role dropdown shows: Grid Master (GM), Grid Master Candidate (GMC), DNS Only, DHCP Only, DNS + DHCP, Reporting
HA toggle enables/disables High Availability - toggle works correctly
Token calculation for NIOS models: TE-926=880, TE-1516=2270 tokens (verified correct)
Token calculation for UDDI sizes: NXVS S=470 tokens (verified correct)
Duplicate member creates copy with '-copy' suffix (Member-1-copy)
Delete member removes member from table and updates totals
Expand row shows DNS/DHCP features with checkboxes and impact percentages
DNS Features: Advanced DNS Protection (-20%), DNS Traffic Control (-25%), Query Or Response Capture (-40%), etc.
DHCP Features: Dynamic DNS (-20%), DHCP Failover (-50%), Fingerprinting (-10%), DHCP Reporting (-15%)
Expanded row shows IP Address, VIP (if HA), Notes input fields
Model/Size dropdown changes based on platform: NIOS shows TE models, NXVS/NXaaS shows size options (3XS-XL)
Header totals update dynamically when members are added/modified/deleted
Grid Member Guidelines info card displays with role explanations
data-testid attributes present: uds-members-table, add-member-button, member-row-*, member-name-*, member-ha-*, member-delete-*
critical_code_review_comments: UDSMembersTable.jsx is well-structured with proper memoization using useMemo and useCallback
Component correctly handles empty state with 'No Grid Members' message
Token calculation logic correctly differentiates between NIOS (model-based) and UDDI (size-based) platforms
DNS/DHCP features are properly filtered based on member role
Expand/collapse row functionality works smoothly with ChevronDown/ChevronRight icons
All dropdowns use shadcn Select component with proper SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem structure
seed_data_creation: Used existing test customer 'Test Customer for Discovery' with 2 DCs (Main DC, DR DC) and 2 Sites (Branch 1, Branch 2). Created test members during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UDS Members Table component fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Grid Members header with count, tokens, DNS/DHCP badges, 2) Member table with editable Name, Location, Platform, Model/Size, Role, HA, Tokens columns, 3) Expand row shows DNS/DHCP feature checkboxes with impact percentages, 4) Add/Duplicate/Delete member functionality, 5) Token calculation: NIOS uses model (TE-926=880, TE-1516=2270), UDDI uses size (NXVS S=470). Component reads locations from dataCenters and sites in DiscoveryContext.

uds_members_table.location: Sizing tab, after Token Calculator Summary

actions.add: Add Grid Member button creates new member with defaults
actions.duplicate: Copy button creates member with '-copy' suffix
actions.delete: Trash button removes member from table
